example_prompt: Create a reusable shareable payment link so customers can pay without a dedicated checkout flow.

reference.description: Your internal reference for this payment link.

description.description: Product or service description shown to the customer on the payment page.

dueDate.description: Expiry date of the payment link in YYYY-MM-DD format.

customerId.description: Existing customer UUID. Use instead of customerName/Phone/Email.

redirectUrlAfterPayment.description: HTTPS URL to redirect the customer after successful payment.

enableMultiplePayment.description: Allow the link to be used for multiple payments (recurring). Default: false.

enableCardPaymentOnly.description: Restrict the payment page to card payments only. Default: false.

paymentUrl.description: Shareable URL the customer opens to complete payment.

details.description: Bictorys error code. Example: "E400-48: Payment link already paid".

gotchas: This endpoint uses the paymentlink-management microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/paymentlink-management/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
To programmatically charge a payment link via the API (rather than sharing the paymentUrl), call create_charge with paymentLinkId set to the returned id.
enableMultiplePayment: false (default) means the link can be used once only. Set it to true for recurring or reusable checkout links (e.g. donation pages, tipping links).
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
